keys.description: Global toggle for open self-registration on the tenant plane. When false the only creation paths are invitation-acceptance + admin creation.
When true, `POST /api/v1/users` from an unauthenticated caller REJECTS unless an invitation_token is supplied. Layered on top of self_registration_enabled — both must permit for open sign-up to work.
When true, newly-provisioned Users land in status='pending' and stay there until an admin activates them, EVEN IF the underlying Identity is email-verified.
Role slug assigned to the User's initial TenantMember when the caller doesn't specify one (invitations always carry an explicit role — this is the self-registration fallback).
Validation gate for adult principals. Waived automatically when identity->dob puts the subject under `user.privacy.adult_transition_age` (minors may enrol name-less until an adult attests).
Optional field by default.
Global kill-switch. Off overrides even the `avatar_upload` entitlement.
Fallback cap. Tier-scaled at the entitlement layer (`avatar_upload` per-tier cap wins when it's lower).
Fallback preferred_locale for Profile rows. Null = fall through to tenant.default_locale which itself falls through to config('app.locale').
Fallback timezone for Profile rows. Null = fall through to tenant.default_timezone.

Redactor policy for minor Profile fields. `guardian_only` = only the AthleteGuardian users + admins with `profile.view.pii.child` see the fields; `tenant_admin` = every tenant admin; `any_authenticated` = every authenticated caller in the same tenant. Compliance floor forces guardian_only when compliance.coppa.enabled AND region.country_code === 'US'.
Age at which the guardian-managed minor becomes self-managed. Fed by `sports::athletes:process-age-transitions` scheduled command.
Age at which the athlete + guardians receive a preview notification about the upcoming adult transition.
Age below which guardians retain `AthleteGuardian.can_manage = true`. At this boundary the teen gains self-edit permissions.
Days a soft-deleted User row stays in the hold window before PurgeErasedUsersJob hard-deletes it. Tenant-side setting may only INCREASE this (max 90d via GDPR compliance policy).
Hours an orphaned Profile row (no referring User) survives before CleanupOrphanedProfilesJob deletes it. Guards against half-provisioned rows piling up.
`GET /api/v1/me` includes the caller's effective permissions array. Off for tighter payloads on very-large permission sets.
`GET /api/v1/me` includes the tenant's enabled feature keys.
`GET /api/v1/me` includes the tenant's terminology overrides (per business_type).
Global kill-switch for multi-tenant memberships. Off = one TenantMember per User. Also gated by the `multi_tenant_membership` entitlement (medium+).
Upper bound on TenantMember rows per User. Belt-and-braces — the entitlement layer caps this per plan, but this is the platform-wide ceiling.
Buffer window for UpdateLastActiveJob. Every 60s the buffered updates flush to `tenant_members.last_active_at`.
